sections.paragraph:
& יֶשַׁע with suff. יִשְׁעִי, יֶשְׁעֲךָ Psa 85:8.

(1) deliverance, aid, [salvation], Psa 12:6 50:23 . Used like verbals with the case of the finite verb, Hab 3:13, לְיֵשַׁע אֶת־מְשִׁיהֶךָ “to deliver thine anointed.” אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׁעִי God of my help [salvation], i.e. my helper [saviour]. Psa 18:47 25:5 27:9 Mic 7:7 Isa 17:10.

(2) safety, welfare, Job 5:4, 11 Job 5:11 Psa 132:16 Isa 61:10 [in these two last cited passages, salvation].
